name: Creole Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup green or red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the tomato concasse, onions, celery, and bell peppers to the pan.
3. Stir in the garlic and creole seasoning mixture.
4. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-6 minutes until the onions have softened.
5. Add the chicken stock, tomato sauce, and sugar; mix well.
6. Add the liquid hot pepper sauce to taste.
7. Simmer over low heat for 20-30 minutes.
8. Serve warm.
